name: Baked Stuffed Clams (Pat Stockett)
recipeIngredient: Old Bay Seasoning (or any Crab spice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shuck and chop clams.
2. Strain and reserve the liquid from the clams.
3. Melt butter in a pan.
4. Add crumbs, parsley, lemon pepper seasoning, garlic powder, oregano, and hot sauce to the melted butter. Mix well.
5. If the mixture is too dry, moisten it with the reserved clam liquor.
6. Fill each of the 12 clam shells with the clam mixture.
7. Sprinkle paprika and Old Bay Seasoning (or any Crab spice) over the top of the stuffed clams.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
